text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
To uncover the mystery behind the<n>treasure map
left by a younger<n>Matikanefukukitaru and her
sister,<n>we visit her house—a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nineteen, twenty! Where I'm standing<n>is twenty
steps from the shrine's<n>bell!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: There are ants here!
choice_data_list: Hmm... Looks like there's nothing noteworthy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Wait a moment... I think there<n>was something
we had to do here...<n>Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without another word, she grabs a<n>shovel and
quickly starts digging.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look! A piece of paper with a code<n>was buried
here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! A code, you say? What a<n>delightful turn of
events!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: en b. Hm... All right, let's keep going!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The kagura hall... How nostalgic. My<n>sister always
looked so pretty in the<n>traditional dance clothing.
I'd play in<n>front of the mirror trying to copy her
makeup.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I see, in that case... Haaah ha ha!<n>Behold, I've
found it! Behind the<n>mirror... "ox"!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Flower ornament... Um... Could it be<n>the vase over
there?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm thinking it's this hanging<n>scroll. My sister
actually painted this<n>one herself. That's why I
think<n>behind it, there'll be—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It says, "wo." ...My sister was always<n>so earnest,
able to do anything she<n>set her mind to. I can only
imagine her<n>smile as she hid these clues...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all the carp! And your<n>garden's
huuuge!
choice_data_list:
Doesn't look like there's anywhere to hide a
clue...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's probably another memory of my<n>sister I need
to recall.

text_block_list.name: Young Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look, Sister! There's something<n>written on the
back of that big fish!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I remembered! Look for thebiggest carp in the pond! Thereshould be a snippet of the code written on its back!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We already have "en b" from the bell<n>and "ox"
from the kagura hall!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The hanging scroll of flowers gave us<n>"wo," and
finally, from the shining<n>back of that great carp, we
have "od."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let me take it from here! Now if I just<n>rearrange
the pieces...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's gotta be referring to this box,<n>then! One,
two, three—heave!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow! Such a pretty kimono! Is this<n>the
treasure?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This kimono... I remember now!<n>That's right... this
is—

text_block_list.name: Young Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Awww! I'm so jealous of the kimono<n>you got
from Mom! I wanna try it on!

text_block_list.name: Fukukitaru's Sister
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'd love to see you wear it<n>someday too!

text_block_list.name: Fukukitaru's Sister
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. I'll draw a treasure map<n>just for you!
So when you get bigger,<n>you can go on a search
for it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So this is where it was hidden. A<n>treasure... just
for me.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fuku, there's something on the<n>ground! It
looks like a letter?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Dear Fuku, you're an adult now! Congratulations! I love how you'realways so happy and full of energy!Thinking of you always!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Sis!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I wanted you to see me... wearing this<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm going to gain enough<n>happiness so
I'll look great in this<n>celebratory kimono!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And on some ultra-lucky, ultra-special<n>occasion,
I'll wear it for myself and<n>my sister!
...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel a presence somewhere behind<n>me. A tingling
sensation, like the<n>warmth of springtime sun.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, once we're bigger, let's get<n>photos taken
with everyone wearing<n>kimonos!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that is a splendid idea! I'll dress<n>up so
beautifully as to put even<n>faeries to shame!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Taking photos together sounds great!<n>Oh, um,
that's only if you're okay<n>with it, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'll do my best, for her too!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, your sister didn't go to these<n>lengths only
to see you cry. Show her<n>your best smile!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Ehehe, that's so<n>silly! Come on,
you guys do it too!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ha... h-haaah ah ha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're right. I'll raise my voice<n>beyond the
clouds!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Inhale... NYAAAH HA HA HA!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Wiping the tears from her face,
Matikanefukukitaru laughs with all<n>her heart as
she embraces life with<n>the happiness and energy
her sister<n>loved so much.
